songs.title: The Cat Is on the Mat

lines.line: It's a mat! It's a mat!
It's a cup! It's a cup!
It's a chair! It's a chair!
She's at the park! At the park!
She's at the park, park, park!
She's at the mall! At the mall!
She's at the mall, mall, mall!
She's at home. She's in bed.
On the mat! On the mat!
The moon is on the mat! (the moon?!)
The moon is on the mat!
On the mat! On the mat!
The mouse is on the mat! (a mouse?!)
The mouse is on the mat!
On the mat! On the mat!
The monkey is on the mat! (a monkey?!)
The monkey is on the mat!
On the mat! On the mat!
A potato is on the mat!
On the mat! On the mat!

critical_gaps.line: On the mat! On the mat!
On the mat! On the mat!
On the mat! On the mat!
On the mat! On the mat!
On the mat! On the mat!

songs.title: The Cat Is on the Mat

lines.line: The cat is on the mat!
The cat is on the mat!
The cat is on the mat!
The mat is on the cat?!
The mat is on the cat?!
The mat is on the cat!
The cat is… on the mat?
The cat is UP! (Come down, cat!)
The cat is on the mat.
A potato is on the mat!

critical_gaps.song_title: The Cat Is on the Mat
The Cat Is on the Mat
critical_gaps.line: A potato is on the mat!

lines.line: Sam sat on the mat! (the mat!)
Sam sat on the sock! (a sock?!)
Sam sat on the… CAT! (the cat?!)
Sam sat on the cat! (oh no!)
The cat sat on Sam! (on Sam!)
The cat sat on the mat.

critical_gaps.line: The cat sat on the mat.

lines.line: No, no — I am an ant!
I am an ant and I CAN!
The ant is on the mat.
(but the potato is NOT the answer!)
The cat naps! The cat naps!
The cat naps on the mat! (the mat!)
The cat naps on the mat!
The cat naps! The cat naps!
The cat naps on the map! (a map?!)
The cat naps on the map!
The cat naps! The cat naps!
The cat naps on the cap! (a cap?!)
The cat naps on the cap!
The cat naps on the pan.
The cat naps on a POTATO!
Will the cat sit? (will it? will it?)
The cat sat in a tin! (a tin?!)
The cat sat in a cap! (a cap?!)
It sat on the mat! (at last!)
A potato sat on the mat!

critical_gaps.line: The cat sat in a tin! (a tin?!)
The cat sat in a cap! (a cap?!)
It sat on the mat! (at last!)
A potato sat on the mat!

lines.line: The hat is on the ant! (the ant?!)
The ant is in the hat!
The hat is on the cat! (the cat?!)
The cat is in the hat!
The hat is on Sam! (it's Sam!)
The ant is in the hat!
(shhh… the ant can nap in the hat…)
Dad and Sam! Dad and Sam!
Dad and the cat! (and the cat!)
Sam and the ant! Sam and the ant!
The cat and the ant! (and the ant!)
Dad is sad. (why is Dad sad?)
Dad can not find the ant!
Sam did it! Sam did it!
The ant is on Dad's hat!
Dad and Sam and the cat and the ant.
(AND, AND, AND — you can read it!)
(but O-N spells ON — you can read it!)

critical_gaps.line: (but O-N spells ON — you can read it!)

lines.line: The pot is hot! The pot is hot!
The pot is hot! The pot is hot!
Not, not, NOT on the pot!
The cat is on the pot! (get off!)
The cat is on the pot!
Hot, hot! Not on the pot!
On the mat! On the pot!
The pot is on top! (up high!)
The dog digs! The dog digs!
The dog digs! The dog digs!
The dog digs! The dog digs!
The dog digs! The dog digs!
The dog digs. The dog digs…
The big dog! The big dog!
As big as a pig! (a pig!)
The dog is big, big, big!
The big dog! The big dog!
As big as a cat! (a cat!)
The dog is big, big, big!
The big dog! The big dog!
As big as a bus! (a bus!)
The dog is big, big, big!
The big dog hid, hid, hid!
The big dog and the potato…
On the bed! On the bed!
In the pen! In the pen!
On the man! On the man!
Get the hens! Get the hens!

critical_gaps.line: In the pen! In the pen!
On the man! On the man!

lines.line: The red rat! The red rat!
What can the red rat do?
The red rat ran, ran, ran!
The red rat! The red rat!
What can the red rat do?
The red rat sat, sat, sat!
The red rat! The red rat!
What can the red rat do?
The red rat hid, hid, hid!
The cat ran at the rat!
The dog ran at the cat!
The red rat ran, ran, ran!
The red rat got a bag…
The red rat ran, ran, ran!
Run up, pup! Run up, pup!
Where did the pup run up?
Run up, pup! Run up, pup!
Where did the pup run up?
Run up, pup! Run up, pup!
Where did the pup run up?
Up in the sun! (in the sun!)
Mud on the pup! Mud on the cat!
Mud on the dog! Mud on the rat!
Run up, pup! Run up, up, up!
The fat fig! The fat fig!
The fat fig! The fat fig!
The dog ran. The pup ran.
The rat ran! The cat ran!
The fat fig! The fat fig!
The fat fig got a cup! (a cup!)
Fun in the sun, sun, sun!
The fat fig ran and ran!
At the top… a potato ran?!
Run, fat fig, run, run, run!
L-l-log! (The bug is on the log!)
The bug is on the log!
The bug is on the log!
The bug is on the log!
The cat is on the log!
The cat is on the log!
The cat is on the log!
The dog is on the log!
The pup is on the log!
The rat is on the log!
The bug is on the log…
The LOG is on the bug?!
The bug is on the log!
The web is wet! The web is wet!
The wig is wet! The wig is wet!
The bug is wet! The bug is wet!
Sam is wet! Sam is wet!
Jam in the jug! Jam in the jug!
Jam in the jug! Jam in the jug!
Jam in the jug! Jam in the jug!
Jam in the jug! Jam in the jug!
k and c… the same click… k… c… k…
duck… sock… rock… (the same click at the end!)
What got the sock? (the duck! the duck!)
What got the rock? (the duck! the duck!)
The cat is at the vet!
The dog is at the vet!
Who is at the vet? (all of us! all of us!)
The rat is at the vet!
The bug is at the vet!
Who is at the vet? (all of us! all of us!)
The duck is at the vet!
The ant is at the vet!
A van is at the vet!
And the vet is… a potato!
We are all at the vet…
Yum! A yam! Yum! A yam!
Yum! A nut! Yum! A nut!
Yum! A fig! Yum! A fig!
Not yum, not yum, a sock!
X never starts — X hides at the end!
A potato?! (does it end in X? NO!)
Mix it up, mix it up!

critical_gaps.line: A potato?! (does it end in X? NO!)
Mix it up, mix it up!

lines.line: A fox in a box! A fox in a box!
Who is in the box? (the fox! the fox!)
The fox is in the box!
Six in a box! Six in a box!
Who is in the box? (six! six!)
The cat is in the box!
The duck is in the box!
Who is in the box? (mix! a big mix!)
Mix it up in the box!
The ox is in the box?!
The ox is in the box?!
The ox is STUCK in the box!

critical_gaps.line: Who is in the box? (the fox! the fox!)
Who is in the box? (mix! a big mix!)
Mix it up in the box!
The ox is STUCK in the box!

lines.line: kw… kw… (q brings u everywhere it goes)
quack… quick… quiz… (qu starts them all!)
The duck says quack, quack, quack!
What does the duck say? (quack! quack!)
The bug can buzz, buzz, buzz!
(It's a… where is… on the mat…)
The bug can buzz! The bug can buzz!
What can the bug do? (buzz! buzz!)
The cat can nap. The dog can dig.
The rat can run. The duck can quack.
The fox can mix. The ant can tag.
The cat is on the mat.
We can read it — every one!

critical_gaps.line: (It's a… where is… on the mat…)
The cat is on the mat.

lines.line: The fish is on the ship!
The fish is on the ship!
The fish is on the ship!
The fish is in! (swim, fish, swim!)
A potato is on the ship!

critical_gaps.line: The fish is in! (swim, fish, swim!)

lines.line: The soft one buzzes — feel it!
The quiet one hushes — feel it!
In the bath, on the path!
The moth is in the bath!
The moth is in the bath!
The moth is in the bath!
The moth is in the bath!
The moth is on the path!
F, L, S, Z — hear the rule!
Double the L! Double the S!
Up the hill — puff, puff, puff!
The bell is on the hill!
The bell is on the hill!
The bell is on the hill!
Puff, puff, up the hill! (puff! puff!)
The bell is on the hill!
The bell fell off the hill!
It hides at the end of the word!
The king can sing a song!
The king can sing it long!
sing… sing… the king can sing…
long… long… a long, long song…
The king can sing at a potato?! (sing, king, sing!)
The wh words ask and ask!
Which is it? Which is it?
What is it? Where is it?
What is it? Where is it?
Snake can swim in a swish! (swish! swish!)
Snake can stop at a potato! (stop, Snake, stop!)

critical_gaps.line: Snake can swim in a swish! (swish! swish!)

lines.line: The flag is on the sled!
The flag is on the sled!
The flag is on the sled!
The sled can zip and slip!
The flag is on the sled!
Snake can sit on the sled!
The flag is on the sled!
Grin and grab and grin! (grin! grin!)
Frog can grin at a potato! (grin, Frog, grin!)
Two sounds at the END — stuck together!
Two sounds at the end! (blend! blend!)
Jump in the best nest! (jump! jump!)
Snake can rest in the nest!

critical_gaps.line: Snake can rest in the nest!

lines.line: Two sounds at the END — stuck together!
The /l/ at the end — hear it! (lllt!)
The /l/ at the end — hear it! (lllp!)
The /l/ at the end is REAL!
The E is magic! (shhh — it's silent!)
The A says its NAME! (A! A!)
The snake is at the gate!
The snake ate the cake! (yum! yum!)
The cake is IN the snake!
A cake on the plate… (a plate!)
The E is magic! (shhh — it's silent!)
The I says its NAME! (I! I!)
It is time to ride! (go! go!)
The E is magic! (shhh — it's silent!)
The O says its NAME! (O! O!)
The bone is at home! (at home!)
The bone is on the nose?! (on the nose!)
The E is magic! (shhh — it's silent!)
The U says its NAME! (U! U!)
The flute and the cube! (toot! toot!)
Snake can hop! Sheep can hum!
The mule can make a tune!
On the ice — nice and slow!
The tree is full! (leaf by leaf!)
The ice is nice! (nice and slow!)
On the ice, on the ice!
The train is in the rain!
The train is in the rain!
The train is in the rain!
Sheep can play in the rain!
Play in the rain all day!
Chick is on the train! (all aboard!)
Play in the rain all day!
Sheep can read! Sheep can read!
Sheep can read! Sheep can read!
The bee is in the tree!
Sheep can read! Sheep can read!
The bee can read too — wait… (a bee can read?!)
See the sea! (the deep blue sea!)
Sheep can read! Sheep can read!
The goat is in the snow!
The goat is in the snow!
The goat is in the snow!
The goat is in the snow!
The goat is on the boat!
The goat can row the boat!

critical_gaps.line: The goat is on the boat!

lines.line: The light is high in the night!
The light is high in the night!
The light is high in the night!
The light is high in the night!
A pie! A pie! (up so high!)
The pie is on the light?! (way up there!)
The star is in the dark!
The star is in the dark!
The star is in the dark!
The star is in the dark!
The car is in the park!
The star is on the farm!

critical_gaps.line: The car is in the park!

lines.line: The horse can eat the corn!
The corn is on the fork!
The corn is in the store!

critical_gaps.line: The corn is on the fork!

lines.line: Spell it e-r… i-r… u-r… ONE sound!
e-r bird… i-r girl… u-r fur…
The bird and the girl. (the end.)
One is short, one is long!
(We can hear it. We can hear it!)
The sheep is on the ship!
The sheep is on the ship!
The ship is on the sea.
The sheep sits on a seat.
The wind! The ship can tip!
Not a ship… not a sheep… (shhh…)
Sheep is on the roof too!
The moon is at the school.
Look at the moon and the school!
The owl is in the town!
The owl is in the town!
The owl and the cow shout!
Down in the town, so proud!

critical_gaps.line: Down in the town, so proud!

lines.line: Sam digs in the soil! (dig! dig!)
The coin is for a toy!
The boy and the coin. (that's a thousand words!)
Say it long — oo, oo, oo!
Chick has the new blue glue.
The glue is on the claw!
Chick is stuck — because the glue is new!
The new blue glue. (all stuck up!)
At the end, y says I!
At the end of a long word — say EE!
little word — y says I… long word — y says ee…
Why, fly, why? (we can spell it now!)
k is a ghost! (shh — silent k!)
The k is there… but you can't hear it!
w is a ghost! (shh — silent w!)
The w is there… but you can't hear it!
b is a ghost! (shh — silent b!)
The b is there… but you can't hear it!
silent k… silent w… silent b…
The lamb has a knot! (a knot!)
The lamb and the wren know the way!
The lamb can climb. (all the way up!)
Add an ending — the word grows!
The fish wishes and wishes! (wish! wish!)
The LAST leaf on the Tree!
At LAST — potato! (say it! spell it!)
The king of the Tree! (crown it! crown it!)
We can read it all! (all of it!)

critical_gaps.line: The LAST leaf on the Tree!

lines.line: (It's a… where is Sejeena… the cat is on the mat… ship or sheep… why, fly, why…)
Star and Owl are here! (here! here!)
The class is jumping and singing!
Bee is reading. Duck is swimming.
What is on the Tree? (look up! look up!)
At the top of the Tree…
Potato is the king! (crown it! crown it!)
Fifty-eight weeks… a thousand words… (we can read…)
The end. (the end! we did it!)

critical_gaps.line: (It's a… where is Sejeena… the cat is on the mat… ship or sheep… why, fly, why…)
What is on the Tree? (look up! look up!)
On the mat! On the mat!
On the mat! On the mat!
On the mat! On the mat!
On the mat! On the mat!
On the mat! On the mat!

critical_gaps.song_title: The Cat Is on the Mat
The Cat Is on the Mat
critical_gaps.line: A potato is on the mat!
The cat sat on the mat.
The cat sat in a tin! (a tin?!)
The cat sat in a cap! (a cap?!)
It sat on the mat! (at last!)
A potato sat on the mat!
(but O-N spells ON — you can read it!)
In the pen! In the pen!
On the man! On the man!
A potato?! (does it end in X? NO!)
Mix it up, mix it up!
Who is in the box? (the fox! the fox!)
Who is in the box? (mix! a big mix!)
Mix it up in the box!
The ox is STUCK in the box!
(It's a… where is… on the mat…)
The cat is on the mat.
The fish is in! (swim, fish, swim!)
Snake can swim in a swish! (swish! swish!)
Snake can rest in the nest!
The goat is on the boat!
The car is in the park!
The corn is on the fork!
Down in the town, so proud!
The LAST leaf on the Tree!
(It's a… where is Sejeena… the cat is on the mat… ship or sheep… why, fly, why…)
What is on the Tree? (look up! look up!)
